name: wide-open-brainstorm
description: Multi-model brainstorming room for product strategy and experience design — serious plus whimsical, multi-altitude, multi-round ideation.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-model brainstorming room for product strategy and experience design — serious plus whimsical, multi-altitude, multi-round ideation.
interface.longDescription: Multi-model brainstorming room for product strategy and experience design — serious plus whimsical, multi-altitude, multi-round ideation. Works well in repo-local and Codex cloud workflows that operate on a checked-out repository.
defaultPrompt: Run a wide-open brainstorming room for this product idea. Move between big-picture strategy, project-level organization, tactical actions, and whimsical metaphors; then distill the strongest differentiated concepts.
